tagline: Your backyard should be your favorite place to relax

hero.headline:
Your Family Pool, Our Family
Promise
hero.subheadline: For 17 years, Merced County families have trusted Best Pro Pool Service to keep their backyard oasis sparkling. We handle every detail — from weekly cleaning to equipment repairs — so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a<br class="hidden md:block">Team That Treats It Like Their Own
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to full construction, Best Pro Pool handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can focus on enjoying your backyard.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Chemical testing, basket emptying, filter maintenance, brushing, and netting — your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance Plans
cards.description: Year-round maintenance starting at $175/mo. We extend the life of your pool and equipment with scheduled care tailored to your needs.

cards.title: Pool & Plumbing Repair
cards.description: Expert leak detection, plumbing repair, and general pool repair to restore your pool to peak condition quickly and affordably.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Diagnosis
cards.description: Professional diagnosis and repair of Pentair, Jandy, Zodiac, and Waterway filters, pumps, heaters, and automation systems.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Energy-efficient pumps, heaters, LED lighting, and automation systems — supplied and installed by our licensed team.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom new pool builds and backyard remodels designed around your vision. From concept to first splash, we handle it all.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll be out to inspect it — no charge, no pressure. We'll give you an honest assessment and transparent quote.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our licensed technicians arrive on schedule and handle cleaning, chemicals, and equipment checks. After every visit, we send you a photo so you can see the results.

steps.title: Relax in Your Backyard
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, safe, and swim-ready all year long. If anything ever looks off, we come back and make it right — that's the Best Pro guarantee.

about.label: Why Merced County Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Locally Operated, Here to Stay
about.description: Founded in 2009 by Benny Friesen and Andrew Jantz, Best Pro Pool Service has grown from a two-man operation into Merced County's most trusted pool company. With over 30 years of combined experience and a 4.9-star reputation built on 136+ reviews, we bring the care and accountability that only a family business can deliver. Every technician on our team treats your pool like their own.

features.title: Photo Proof After Every Visit
features.description: We send you a photo of your sparkling pool after every service so you always know the job was done right.

features.title: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
features.description: You'll know exactly what you're paying before we start. No hidden fees, no upsells, no contracts required.

features.title: All Major Brands Serviced
features.description: Authorized service for Pentair, Jandy, Zodiac, Waterway, and Intermatic — we fix and install it all.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Plans starting at $175/mo. No contracts — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Sparkling Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We've built our 4.9-star reputation one pool at a time, and we plan to keep it that way. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise — it's how we run our family business.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent pool issues, we offer priority response. Just call us at 209-358-7665 and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Merced, Atwater, Turlock, Livingston, Winton, Delhi, Patterson, Hilmar, Ceres, and surrounding Merced County communities. If you're nearby, give us a call — we likely cover your area.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Nope! Most clients give us gate access and we handle everything. After each visit, we send you a photo of your pool so you always know the job was done right.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Best Pro Pool Service is a licensed contractor (License #871411), fully bonded and insured. We're also authorized service providers for Pentair, Jandy, Zodiac, Waterway, and Intermatic.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. No contracts, no cancellation penalties. We believe in earning your business every single visit — that's how we've maintained a 4.9-star rating for 17 years.

testimonials.name: Yvonne T.
testimonials.text: We love our pool service! Best Pro Pools are the very best! Always on time, always doing a great job and always letting us know if there are any issues with our equipment!

testimonials.name: Elizabeth W.
testimonials.text: They send you a picture every time they clean your pool. It is wonderful to see your pool looking so clean and beautiful after every service visit.

testimonials.name: Arthur D.
testimonials.text: Fixed my pool issue and charged less than quoted. Honest and reliable service you can count on. I wouldn't trust anyone else with my pool.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Stays Perfect Year-Round?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure pool inspection from Merced County's top-rated pool team. No contracts, no hidden fees — just honest service from a family that cares.
benefits: Free pool inspection — no strings attached
